name: terminal-markdown-cleaner
description: Clean terminal-copied Markdown and box drawing tables from Ghostty, Claude Code, and Codex CLI.

scripts.check: node --check bin/clean-terminal-markdown.mjs && node --check src/app.mjs && node --check src/cleaner.mjs && node --check src/clipboard-cleaner.mjs && node --check src/shortcuts.mjs && node --check src/table-cleaner.mjs && node --check src/terminal-grid.mjs
